slides.headline: Finding clinical hours still feels random.
slides.subtext: Too many students still piece it together from tabs, school docs, screenshots, and whatever clinic site they can find.

slides.headline: 9,512 openings. One map.
slides.subtext: The best student proof is the national map: one screen that instantly makes the search feel bigger and easier.

slides.headline: See the clinic before you click.
slides.subtext: Preview-style proof feels useful fast: a featured clinic card plus a real dashboard view beats another abstract promise.

slides.headline: Search, save, track, log.
slides.subtext: The account should feel like the next step after discovery, not a second system you have to learn from scratch.

slides.headline: Browse as guest. Sign in when ready.
slides.subtext: That is a better close for cold traffic: let people explore first, then create an account when saving progress actually feels valuable.
